generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SteeringActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis component controlling vehicle steering via motor servo actuators"
]

instance SpeedController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Onboard Vedder Electronic Speed Controller managing motor voltage for speed regulation"
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano-based FE generating motor voltage commands via Data Pre-Processing FE (ISO 23247)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SteeringActuator
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SpeedController
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing object detection via point cloud processing (DBSCAN clustering + Kalman filtering)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARObjectTracks
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthEnvironmentData
]

instance EgoVehicleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors measuring ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data Streams
instance LiDARObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthEnvironmentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSensor
]

instance DataTranslationFEOutput : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthEnvironmentData
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
]

instance RemoteManagementCommands : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataTranslationFEOutput
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model for processing LiDAR point clouds into object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingFE
]

instance KalmanFilteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model for tracking detected objects through time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingFE
]

instance ISO15622ACCLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic (Performance Class I)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputingFE
]

instance SQLDatabaseStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "External SQL database storing object tracks and ego-vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingFE
]

instance ROS2VisualizationPipeline : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ROS2-based 3D visualization pipeline for rendering ego-vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedDrivingPath
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationFE
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization of projected driving path based on ego vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputingFE
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) for inter-entity communication and component orchestration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingFE
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputingFE
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationFE
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Feature Engine implementing ISO 23247 for message type alignment and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DepthEnvironmentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RemoteManagementCommands
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based compute hardware (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) offloading ACC computation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputingFE
]

instance PointCloudProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine handling point cloud clustering and preprocessing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HokuyoLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:inputTo IntelDepthCamera
]

instance ObjectTrackingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine implementing Kalman filtering for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringModel
]

instance ACCComputingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine performing lead-vehicle-based speed calculation for ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO15622ACCLogic
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARObjectTracks
]

instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine handling real-time 3D visualization of driving scenario"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2VisualizationPipeline
]

instance ControlPanelUIFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User Interface Feature Engine for remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency braking)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RemoteManagementCommands
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine generating time-series reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseStorage
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides TroubleshootingInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloading : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC logic computation from vehicle ECUs to cloud-based NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware"
    DTDFVocab:provides ResourceOptimizationAction
]

instance RemoteManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enabling operators to disable/enable ACC, set desired speed, or trigger emergency braking via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAction
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, detected objects, and projected driving path for operational awareness"
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data monitoring capabilities for developers to diagnose system issues during ACC development"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimizing ACC performance through real-time visual feedback and command adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ResourceOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reducing resource constraints by offloading ACC computation to cloud hardware"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafetyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executing emergency braking commands triggered via remote management interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PerformanceAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting ACC parameters (enable/disable, set desired speed) through operator interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C17: Environment Components
instance CentralizedDigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationFE
    base:contains ReportingFE
    base:contains ACCComputingFE
    base:contains VisualizationFE
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SteeringActuator
    base:contains SpeedController
    base:contains JetsonOrinNanoActuationFE
    base:contains PointCloudProcessingFE
    base:contains ObjectTrackingFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends commands to the PT via:
  - **Desired speed adjustments** (via ACC Controlling FE) to the vehicle’s motor actuator (converted to voltage commands by the **Actuation FE**).
  - **Emergency braking commands** and **ACC enable/disable toggles** through the **Control Panel UI FE** (User Interface FE in ISO 23247).
  - **Latency-constrained communication**: End-to-end latency ≤ 100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance) for real-time control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time granularity** with:
  - **Data collection rate**: Object tracks and ego-vehicle state updated every **perception cycle** (not explicitly quantified but aligned with ACC control loop frequency, typically <100 ms).
  - **Synchronization accuracy**: Clock synchronization between PT and DT entities requires **≤100 ms accuracy** (due to hardware limitations), ensuring event ordering and data integrity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **three-entity hierarchy** (ISO 23247-inspired):
  1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor processing (LiDAR/Depth Camera data) and actuation (motor/servo commands) via ROS2 packages.
  2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (object/vehicle state), reporting (SQL database), and ACC control logic (ISO 23247 Controlling FE).
  3. **User Entity**: Provides two sub-FEs:
     - **3D Visualization FE** (User Interface FE) for real-time rendering.
     - **Control Panel FE** (User Interface FE) for remote management (enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency braking).
  Inter-entity communication uses **Wi-Fi** (UDP-based) for low-latency (<100 ms) data exchange between the vehicle and cloud-based DT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC logic validation and simulation (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance).
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive troubleshooting during vehicle operation. The DT covers the 'as-operated' lifecycle stage, focusing on runtime performance and safety validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic (performance class I) validated via 1/10th-scale testing.
  - **Validation**: Real-time data collection (LiDAR/Depth Camera) and 3D visualization accuracy tested via on-board camera correlation.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Object tracking relies on DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filters to mitigate noise in LiDAR point clouds.
  - **Error Mitigation**: Data Translation FE standardizes units (e.g., LiDAR coordinates) to prevent misinterpretation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs a **hybrid network architecture**:
  - **Onboard Communication**: ROS2 network for intra-vehicle component communication (e.g., sensor data to Physical Twin Entity).
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: Wi-Fi (UDP-based) for low-latency (<100 ms) data exchange between the vehicle and cloud-based DT.
  - **Protocols**: ROS2 (ROS 2.0) for middleware, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, and **Data Translation FE** for serialization/unit conversion."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **cloud-edge hybrid model**:
  - **Edge Layer**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (cloud-based compute) and Jetson NX (onboard sensor processing) for real-time processing.
  - **Cloud Layer**: External storage (SQL database) for historical data and report generation.
  - **Deployment Tools**: ROS2 for component orchestration, Python/C++ for FE implementations, and MATLAB/Simulink for complex algorithms (e.g., point cloud clustering)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Systems**: No explicit mention of integration with other DTs or external information systems (e.g., fleet coordination, cloud-based analytics). Potential future integration could include:
    - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance for latency).
    - **Cloud-based analytics** for large-scale fleet monitoring."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are addressed by:
  - **Ownership**: Data is stored externally and managed by the DT service provider, with no explicit mention of ISO/SAE 21434 compliance in the documents.
  - **Privacy**: No specific privacy protocols are detailed; the system focuses on real-time data exchange for operational purposes."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows **ISO 23247** (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) for reference architecture, with adaptations for automotive systems (e.g., Physical Twin Entity). Additional standards include ISO 15622 (ACC), ROS2, and 3GPP TS 22.185 (V2V communication)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Design**: ACC logic adheres to ISO 15622 (performance class I), ensuring safe following distance.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency ≤100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185) to prevent catastrophic failures.
  - **Remote Operation**: Emergency braking and ACC disable commands are validated before execution to mitigate risks.
  - **Data Integrity**: Clock synchronization (≤100 ms accuracy) ensures event ordering and prevents replay attacks.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: DT falls under the **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin (Human-in-the-Loop)** taxonomy (David & Bork [30]), with operators monitoring critical decisions."
]
